_instructions.slide_naming: slide-01.jpg, slide-02.jpg ... (exported from PowerPoint → File → Export → JPEG/PNG)
_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder for embedded PDF viewer

title: Spreadsheet Audit
subtitle: Data Validation and Error Checking
overview: Students learn how to improve spreadsheet accuracy using data validation rules and error-checking tools. They discover how to prevent incorrect entries, identify mistakes, and ensure data quality in spreadsheets used for business, education, and daily life.

images._note: Add screenshots of Excel data validation, error checking examples, spreadsheets, and student activities.

youtubeVideos.title: Excel Data Validation Tutorial
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn how to apply data validation rules in Excel.

youtubeVideos.title: Excel Error Checking Features
youtubeVideos.desc: Identify and fix common spreadsheet errors.

youtubeVideos.title: Excel for Beginners
youtubeVideos.desc: Basic spreadsheet skills and data management.

activity.title: Create a Student Data Entry Form
steps: Create columns for Name, Age, Grade, and Attendance
Apply data validation to Age (5-18 years)
Create a dropdown list for Grade selection
Configure error alerts for invalid entries
Use error checking tools to identify issues
Correct the errors and verify data accuracy

quiz.q: What is the purpose of data validation?
quiz.explanation: Data validation helps prevent users from entering invalid data.

quiz.q: Which feature allows users to choose from predefined options?
quiz.explanation: Dropdown lists ensure consistent data entry.
Auditing helps identify and correct data errors.

quiz.q: What happens when invalid data is entered into a validated cell?
quiz.explanation: Validation rules can display an error message.

quiz.q: Which type of validation can limit ages between 5 and 18?
quiz.explanation: Number validation restricts values to a specific range.

options: A help message shown before entering data
quiz.explanation: Input messages guide users when entering data.

quiz.q: Which application is commonly used for spreadsheets?
quiz.explanation: Microsoft Excel is a popular spreadsheet application.

quiz.q: What is a common spreadsheet error?
quiz.explanation: Formula mistakes can produce incorrect results.

quiz.q: What does error checking help identify?
quiz.explanation: Error checking helps locate and fix spreadsheet issues.

quiz.q: Which skill is developed through spreadsheet auditing?
quiz.explanation: Spreadsheet auditing improves data quality and accuracy.
